glue.table.storagedescriptor.CfnAbout: Describes the physical storage of table data.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.BucketColum.Description: A list of reducer grouping columns, clustering columns, and bucketing columns in the table.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.Columns.Description: A list of the `Columns` in the table.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.Compressed.Description: `True` if the data in the table is compressed, or `False` if not.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.InputFormat.Description: The input format: `SequenceFileInputFormat` (binary), or `TextInputFormat`, or a custom format.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.Location.Description: The physical location of the table. By default, this takes the form of the warehouse location, followed by the database location in the warehouse, followed by the table name.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.NumberOfBuc.Description: Must be specified if the table contains any dimension columns.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.OutputForma.Description: The output format: `SequenceFileOutputFormat` (binary), or `IgnoreKeyTextOutputFormat`, or a custom format.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.Parameters.Description: The user-supplied properties in key-value form.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.SchemaRefer.Description: An object that references a schema stored in the AWS Glue Schema Registry.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.SkewedInfo.Description: The information about values that appear frequently in a column (skewed values).

glue.table.storagedescriptor.SortColumns.Description: A list specifying the sort order of each bucket in the table.

glue.table.storagedescriptor.StoredAsSub.Description: `True` if the table data is stored in subdirectories, or `False` if not.
